case_title: NEN JIN THIO VS. KENNIS FANG

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FANG, KENNIS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THIO, NEN JIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FANG, KENNIS $2,970.80 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,985.80, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED THAT DEFENDANT HIS HIS CAR AND IS RESPONSIBLE FOR THE CLAIMED DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-12-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF NEN JIN THIO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THIO, NEN JIN AS TO DEFENDANT FANG, KENNIS
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 7/10/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ORDER RE: CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-31-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2018 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO MAY-31-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF NEN JIN THIO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS UNTIMELY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH ZARAH; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-31-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY 31-2018 BY JPT:DAVID LAVINE; PLAINTIFF APPEARS WITH INDONESIAN INTERPRETER -ANG JOHANES SUDAA; NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; NO EXHIBITS RETAINED; CLERK: B. PAREDES; NOT REPORTED (506)
